arts.ttl: 'I was Liverpool star who made it to World Cup final – I dreamt of Arsenal but it didn’t happen'
arts.sum: Ryan Babel enjoyed four years at Liverpool after joining the club in 2007, but the Dutchman has admitted he would have loved to play for the Reds' rivals Arsenal

arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer news: Gunners 'make informal approach' for AC Milan star
arts.sum: Arsenal allegedly make what is described as 'an informal approach' for one of AC Milan's star players ahead of the 2025 transfer windows.

arts.ttl: ‘Ready’: Arsenal are now willing to pay £50m to sign ‘world class’ winger next summer – journalist

arts.ttl: Man Utd scrapped LGBTQ+ jacket plans
arts.sum: Manchester United abandoned plans to wear a jacket supporting the LGBTQ+ community before the Sunday's win over Everton because a player refused to wear it.

arts.ttl: Neil Lennon tells Man Utd star he wouldn't start at Celtic as he labels Rodgers' crop 'best for a decade'
arts.sum: The former Hoops gaffer says the midfield talent pool would spell bad news for Eriksen at Parkhead

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim warned of Man Utd reality check as Arsenal backed for Premier League win
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim will face Mikel Arteta for the first time in the Premier League at the Emirates tonight, as his rejuvenated Manchester United take on red-hot Arsenal

arts.ttl: Four players craving Ruben Amorim approval after Manchester United team news vs Arsenal confirmed
arts.sum: Man United head coach Ruben Amorim will be forced into making changes for Wednesday night's Premier League clash with Arsenal.

Kai Havertz has confidently proclaimed that Manchester United cannot stop Arsenal if the Gunners play at their best on Wednesday evening. The Gunners have rediscovered their form after a sticky patch, while Man Utd have won two matches in a row under new manager Ruben Amorim.

arts.ttl: “Would be very sad” – Official worries about losing Chido Obi-Martin, as Manchester United progress opens international debate
arts.sum: At the weekend, Chido Obi-Martin revealed he’d signed his first professional contract at Manchester United. On Friday, the youngster turned 17 years of age, making him eligible to sign the pro deal. On Tuesday, the striker made his debut for Manchester United U21s in their 1-0 win over Rochdale.
